description: Create a new Layout Based Visit Form (LBF) in LibreHealth EHR named 'Neurology Intake' with the ID 'LBF_Neuro'. Log in using the credentials admin/password. The form must include a group titled 'Reflexes' with two active text fields: 'Patellar Reflex' and 'Achilles Reflex'. Ensure the form and its fields are active and saved.
